title: GirlZone 43-Piece Rainbow Stationery Set for Girls, Jumbo Rainbow Arts & Crafts Filled Stationery Pencil Case for Girls, Art Case for Toddlers, Kids, Teens & Teachers
features: Cute Stationery Set: Art case for creatives! Enjoy 43 cute stationery items cozily housed in a stunning glitter rainbow pencil case, for fun artistic exploration
What's Inside: The kids pencil case includes 2 pencils, 1 rainbow pen, 1 sharpener, 1 eraser, 10 colored pencils, 18 colored markers, 1 ruler, 1 sticky notepad, 2 highlighter pens and 6 gel pens
Stay Organized: Help them stay organized with our versatile color pencil case for kids with built-in organizer garters for pens, erasers, rulers, and more, perfect for any young scholar!
An Ideal Gift: Delight young minds with our stationery set for kids - the perfect gift for birthdays, Easter, Christmas and more. Inspire creativity all year round!
Packed for School: Stylish and practical, our color pencil case is perfect for toddlers, kids, teens, and even teachers in pre-school, grade school, and high school. Organizing art supplies made fun!
description: Product Description Arts and Crafts Set for Girls! GirlZone Glitter Zipper Stationery Set Girls will love to carry this around with them when visiting friends, relatives and even going on holidays!This gorgeous glittery set if filled with all the stationery they will need: 18 coloured markers 10 coloured pencils 6 gel pens 2 highlighter pens 2 greylead pencils 1 sticky notepad 1 rainbow pen 1 pencil sharpener 1 15cm ruler 1 eraser Arts and Crafts Gifts for Girls Hours of creative fun All the stationery you will ever need, to draw, color and doodle! – tucked up in the cutest shimmery case with a rainbow at the end of the zip! Girls will love carrying it around with them under their arm. Keep stationery tidy This creative colouring gift is filled with 43 pieces of stationery, to keep girls entertained for hours of arts and crafts fun. It has pens, pencils, ruler, rubber, sharpener, sticky notes, highlighters and a 6 color pen! Birthday present idea! If you're sending this as a birthday present or gift, we can Gift Wrap it for you and add a Gift Tag! Just click on the Gift Wrapping Option at the checkout and we'll do the rest for you. So simple and such a treat for the birthday girl! 6 color writing pen This cute writing pen has six different colors to click through and is great to use at school! Sticky Notepad The sticky notepad is a great way of creating messages and notes to friends or stick them around the bedroom! 6 Glittery Gel Pens The 6 gel pens are of course - glittery! These make a great addition to any colouring or drawing masterpiece.
